This template is public. Redact sensitive details when needed.
For private reports, use lajarre@proton.me.

## summary

What happened?

## people involved

List GitHub handles or public identifiers only.

## when and where

Link the issue, PR, commit, or discussion if available.

## requested follow-up

State whether you need moderation, a pause in contact, content removal, or another response.
